title: YouTube Poop: YOU'RE A CREEP!!!
description:
This is a somewhat important YouTube Poop for me because there are more clips than Billo clips in here.

Clips Used include:

- Freakazoid
- Kids In The Hall
- Mario Golf Trailer
- The Simpsons
- Bill O'Reilly

Special thanks to fellow pooper PimpsAhoy for showing me how to get at these clips.
